full_text:
Sun Shao 孫紹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Shao (孫紹)was born in Wu. Sun Ce’s posthumous son. Died young, some criticize Quan’s treatment of Shao. Sun Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Shao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
